prompt:
My Greeter contract is already deployed on Casper Testnet. The package hash is contract-package-ac102e24f6dc92e7e3b098f2af114817a67b62fe35764813854057a0859571f4. I want to:

1. Call get_greeting to read the current greeting
2. Call set_greeting to change it to 'GM Casper!'
3. Call greet to get a personalized message

Give me the CLI commands for each.

assertions.name: uses-package-subcommand
assertions.text: Uses put-transaction package (not session) for entry point calls

assertions.name: has-correct-package-hash-format
assertions.text: Uses hash- prefix for the contract package hash

assertions.name: get-greeting-entry-point
assertions.text: Has correct get_greeting entry point call

assertions.name: set-greeting-entry-point
assertions.text: Has correct set_greeting entry point call

assertions.name: greet-entry-point
assertions.text: Has correct greet entry point call

assertions.name: set-greeting-arg-format
assertions.text: Has correct session-arg format for string argument
